feature_to_integration.reviews: sanity (CMS) — native; Google Business Profile surface: advisory (Phase 2)

template_choice.reason: No auth, no payments, no DB in Phase 1. Marketing site with CMS and AI chat is the full scope. No SaaS template matched — using the preset stack directly.
template_choice.cms_activation_reason: Content volume: 8 service pages, 20+ area pages, blog, reviews, FAQs, gallery — exceeds 3-page threshold.

ai_chat_decision.reason: Low latency, cost-effective for single-session triage; no memory required per session for a service-inquiry bot. Streaming for responsive UX. Not a persistent AI product — lead capture only.

not_chosen.claude-haiku: Anthropic API adds another vendor; not needed at this scale
not_chosen.custom_fine_tuned: No training data available; premature for Phase 1

booking_decision.reason: Zero backend complexity; client already has or can create a free Calendly account; swap-able for any booking provider later. Not building custom calendar in Phase 1.

maps_decision.reason: Best coverage for AU suburb data; Static Maps API for area landing pages (no heavy JS load); Interactive Maps JS API only on /areas page (lazy loaded).
maps_decision.cost_note: Static Maps < $2/1000 requests; Interactive Maps free tier covers 28,000 loads/month

cms_schema_decisions.revalidation_strategy: ISR with revalidate: 3600; on-demand revalidation via Sanity webhook → /api/revalidate

colour_palette_decision.rationale: Follows local-business-trust archetype: credible deep hue + warm CTA accent. Blue-water association reinforces plumbing vertical.

font_decision.loading: next/font with preload; display: swap; subset latin

floating_dock_animation_decision.entry: Slide up from bottom-right on page load after 1.5s delay
floating_dock_animation_decision.idle_pulse: AI chat button pulses after 30s of no interaction (draws attention without being disruptive)
floating_dock_animation_decision.reduced_motion: Static position, no animation; WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
floating_dock_animation_decision.mobile: Smaller FABs (44×44px touch targets); always visible above page content

phase_2_features_deferred: Customer account / job history portal (requires auth + DB)
Google Business Profile live review sync (requires Google Business API OAuth)
SMS confirmation via Twilio (requires budget approval)
Technician GPS ETA tracker (requires real-time backend)
assumptions: Brand name 'AusPlumb Pro' is a placeholder — client to supply real brand before launch
Phone number and WhatsApp number are placeholders — client to supply
ABN and licence numbers are placeholders — client to supply before launch
Suburbs covered will be seeded from a client-supplied list
Calendly account creation and configuration is client responsibility
Real photos of staff, vehicles, and completed jobs are client responsibility
